title: Proclamation No. 1092, s. 2015
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO 1092

DECLARING FRIDAY, 14 AUGUST 2015, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF TUGUEGARAO

WHEREAS, the City of Tuguegarao marks the celebration of its “Pawurulun Afi Festival 2015” on 8-16 August 2015;

WHEREAS, the Office of the Mayor has requested that Friday, 14 August 2015 instead of 16 August 2015, which falls on a Sunday, be declared as a special (non-working) day in the City of Tuguegarao;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the City of Tuguegarao be given full opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA, JR., Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Friday, 14 August 2015, as a special (non-working) day in the City of Tuguegarao.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 10th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Fifteen.

By the authority of the President:

(Sgd.) PAQUITO N. OCHOA Executive Secretary
